creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Enji Cooper from comment #0)

> … Many of the filesystems in FreeBSD have a section 5 manpage …

Section 7 for ffs: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=ffs&sektion=7&manpath=FreeBSD>

Sections 8 (and 4) for zfs (and tuning thereof) in ZFS: 

<https://openzfs.github.io/openzfs-docs/man/8/zfs.8.html>
<https://openzfs.github.io/openzfs-docs/man/4/zfs.4.html>
